Class SingletonLabelFactory<T extends TermLabel>

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.label.SingletonLabelFactory<T>
Type Parameters:
T - the type of the wrapped term label can be narrowed.
All Implemented Interfaces:
TermLabelFactory<T>
public final class SingletonLabelFactory<T extends TermLabel> extends Object implements TermLabelFactory<T>
A factory for creating singleton TermLabel.

The resulting factory does not accept arguments for the builder methods and always returns a fixed term level value.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    SingletonLabelFactory(T singletonLabel)
    Instantiates a new singleton label factory for a label.

  • Constructor Details

    • SingletonLabelFactory

      public SingletonLabelFactory(T singletonLabel)
      Instantiates a new singleton label factory for a label.
      Parameters:
      singletonLabel - the label to be wrapped, not null.

  • Method Details

    • parseInstance

      public T parseInstance(List<String> arguments, TermServices services) throws TermLabelException
      Parses the arguments and produces a term label.

      An implementation should throw a TermLabelException if the arguments cannot be parsed correctly for this type.

      This implementation does not accept arguments and returns the stored label

      Specified by:
      parseInstance in interface TermLabelFactory<T extends TermLabel>
      Parameters:
      arguments - the arguments for parsing, not null, no entry null
      services - a non-null services object to look up symbols.
      Returns:
      the according term label with the given arguments, not null
      Throws:
      TermLabelException - if the parameters were illegally formatted
